title: Peruvian Empanada Baguette Sandwich
description: A fusion of Peruvian flavors with French baguette for a unique breakfast sandwich.
instructions: Preheat a pan or griddle to medium heat.
Place the baguette on the pan and toast until lightly browned.
Spread a layer of mashed avocado on the bottom half of the baguette.
Add 2 slices of molten cheese on top of the avocado.
Place the pre-cooked empanada on top of the cheese.
Sprinkle chopped cilantro on top of the empanada.
Place the top half of the baguette on the empanada.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes until the cheese is melted and the bread is crispy.
